review_comment_summary: Implementation Work index copied global likely_code_refs into every per-spec work item, which could over-scope coding agents.
fix_summary: Added per-spec likely_affected_code_refs_by_spec in the delta snapshot and scoped work item code refs from that map.

review_comment_summary: Malformed implementation delta snapshots could crash when target was not an object.
fix_summary: Added explicit target type validation before work-index field access.

review_comment_summary: Implementation delta status ignored policy flags that made missing trace/evidence baselines non-blocking.
fix_summary: Derived readiness now honors blocks_on_missing_trace and blocks_on_missing_evidence policy flags.

review_comment_summary: AGENTS.md introduced absolute local markdown links that would be broken outside one workstation.
fix_summary: Replaced local absolute links with repository-relative links and added a regression assertion against /Users markdown links.

review_comment_summary: The policy allowed accepted risk as a closure path but did not make the residual-risk requirement explicit enough.
fix_summary: Added an explicit accepted_risk_action contract and test coverage that accepted risk requires residual risk recording.

review_comment_summary: Required string fields could pass validation when JSON records used null or non-string values because str(None) produced a non-blank value.
fix_summary: Added strict required-string validation with invalid_field_type and blank_required_field findings for non-string required closure fields.

review_comment_summary: Non-list verification values produced verification_must_be_list findings but were classified as missing_verification, sending the wrong next_gap.
fix_summary: Prioritized invalid contract findings before missing-field statuses so non-list verification becomes invalid_feedback_record.

review_comment_summary: The policy test required review_feedback_records.json to be non-empty even though an empty list is a valid artifact state.
fix_summary: Removed the non-empty assertion while keeping vocabulary validation for any records that are present.

review_comment_summary: Accepted-risk review-feedback follow-ups were visible as review_* next gaps and therefore became immediate ready_for_review, high-priority backlog items.
fix_summary: Special-cased accepted_risk_recorded review-feedback follow-ups so they remain visible as info-priority items without entering the urgent ready_for_review filter.

review_comment_summary: Dashboard review-feedback named filters used keys that did not match the backlog projection filter names, breaking dashboard-to-backlog drill-down expectations.
fix_summary: Aligned dashboard named filter keys with backlog projection keys: review_feedback_invalid and review_feedback_accepted_risk.

review_comment_summary: Legacy implementation_work_index artifacts without implementation_backlog.items could produce dashboard counts while adding no normalized graph backlog rows.
fix_summary: Added compatibility normalization when loading existing implementation work indexes, rebuilding backlog items from entries or grouped legacy next-gap data.

review_comment_summary: Transition packet validation summary output kept only finding_count, losing the actual findings on non-zero validation failures.
fix_summary: Preserved findings and findings_by_family in transition_packet_validation summary output.

review_comment_summary: --output-mode help text said standalone artifact commands even though the implementation also affects graph-health observation JSON output.
fix_summary: Updated argparse help to describe JSON-emitting supervisor commands and compact diagnostic summaries.

review_comment_summary: Graph-health observation summary mode omitted the detailed graph_health observations that operators use for diagnosis.
fix_summary: Kept the full graph_health diagnostic payload and observation_count in graph_health_observation summary output.

review_comment_summary: Changing default supervisor reasoning from xhigh to medium removed post-timeout quiet/progress grace from default child runs.
fix_summary: Allowed medium reasoning to use the same quiet/progress grace windows as xhigh and added parameterized regression coverage.

review_comment_summary: SG-SPEC-0043 updated_at reflected the 2026-04-27 refinement, but last_gate_at still pointed to an older approval timestamp.
fix_summary: Refreshed SG-SPEC-0043 last_gate_at so the approved gate timestamp no longer predates the current contents.
residual_risk: A repository-wide timestamp freshness validator is intentionally deferred because many legacy spec nodes still carry older last_gate_at values; this PR fixes only the reviewed SG-SPEC-0043 drift.

review_comment_summary: Proposal 0040 used inline status text that parse_proposal_document would not treat as machine-readable proposal status.
fix_summary: Converted the inline status line into a parseable ## Status section and verified proposal_runtime_index reports status Draft proposal for 0040.

review_comment_summary: Proposal 0040 introduced a new --branch-rewrite-root selector instead of reusing the supervisor's existing --target-spec selector.
fix_summary: Changed the proposal command and input contract to use --target-spec as the branch root selector.

review_comment_summary: Proposal 0040 nested canonical_mutations_allowed and tracked_artifacts_written under mutation_boundary, unlike existing derived artifact contracts.
fix_summary: Moved canonical_mutations_allowed and tracked_artifacts_written to top-level fields in the output contract example.

review_comment_summary: Proposal 0040 defined preview_status values without specifying corresponding review_state and next_gap behavior for blocked states.
fix_summary: Added an explicit Status Mapping section that maps ready, no-candidate, invalid, too-large, unresolved-gate, broken-reference, and empty-branch statuses to review_state and next_gap values.

review_comment_summary: Proposal 0040 required review evidence such as source graph version and inspected edges but did not show where those fields live in the output contract.
fix_summary: Added provenance and review_evidence fields to the output contract and mapped each review-boundary evidence requirement to those fields.

review_comment_summary: The graph backlog viewer contract recommended returning raw artifact JSON while also asking viewers to show file mtime, unlike the envelope pattern used by other viewer endpoints.
fix_summary: Updated the endpoint contract to return the standard viewer metadata envelope with path, mtime, mtime_iso, and the unmodified artifact under data.

review_comment_summary: Branch rewrite preview accepted historical lineage nodes as roots even though the mode is scoped to active refines subtrees.
fix_summary: Added a non-active root guard that returns invalid_root with blocked review evidence when the requested root is historical.

review_comment_summary: Branch rewrite preview loaded policy-declared preview_status and review_state vocabularies but did not validate generated artifacts against them.
fix_summary: Added branch rewrite status contract validation and regression coverage for invalid preview_status and mapped review_state drift.

review_comment_summary: Branch rewrite subtree traversal used list pop(0), making FIFO traversal O(n^2) if subtree policy limits grow.
fix_summary: Switched branch rewrite traversal to collections.deque with popleft while preserving traversal behavior.

review_comment_summary: Historical candidate classification could be overwritten by later bookkeeping or topology-prose heuristics.
fix_summary: Made historical candidate handling mutually exclusive so historical lineage keeps deemphasize_historical_lineage as the suggested action.
